groups.label: Gene name
groups.hint: At least one gene identifier must be provided.

columns.description: HGNC symbol (e.g. TP53)
Ensembl gene ID (e.g. ENSG00000141510)

errors.message: Please select how genes are named in your data.

groups.label: p value representation
groups.hint: How are p values stored in your file? Please only include one field.

columns.description: p value (e.g. 0.00034). Smaller p values are more significant.
Negative log₁₀ p value (e.g. 3.47). Larger values indicate greater significance.

errors.message: Please select how p values are represented in your data.

groups.label: Position
groups.hint: How is the position of the gene represented?
groups.requirementDetail: If any position field is included, all three must be provided.

columns.description: Chromosome where the gene is located
Start position of the gene (0/1 based)
End position of the gene (0/1 based)

errors.message: If you include position data, all three fields (chromosome, start, end) are required.

groups.label: Effect size
groups.hint: Measuring effect sizes is optional for gene-based GWAS. The most common choices are beta and odds ratio.

columns.description: Regression coefficient.
Odds ratio estimate.
Z-score statistic.
Hazard ratio estimate.

errors.message: Odds ratio and hazard ratio cannot both be selected as effect sizes.

primaryForm.name: primary_effect_gene
primaryForm.hint: You've selected multiple effect sizes. Which is the primary measure of effect for your study?
primaryForm.note: (The primary measure of effect will be put in a standardised column index in the output file.)

groups.label: Uncertainty estimate
groups.hint: If you include an effect size, you must provide an uncertainty estimate. The most common choices are standard error for beta, and confidence intervals for odds ratios or hazard ratios.
groups.requirementDetail: Required when an effect size is provided.

columns.description: Standard error.
Lower bound of the confidence interval (typically odds ratio).
Upper bound of the confidence interval (typically odds ratio).

errors.message: Standard error is only valid for beta, and beta requires a standard error.
Z-score is a standardised statistic and cannot have an associated uncertainty estimate.
Confidence intervals are only valid for odds ratio or hazard ratio. Both bounds must be provided if one is given.

groups.label: Other fields
groups.hint: Please consider including this data to improve the quality of your submission.
groups.note: You can also include a reasonable number of extra fields relevant to your study in your submission.

columns.description: Sample size per gene.

groups.label: Position
groups.hint: How is the position of the variant represented?

columns.description: Chromosome where the variant is located
Start position of the variant (0/1 based)
End position of the variant (0/1 based)

errors.message: All position fields (chromosome, start, end) are required.

groups.label: Statistical significance
groups.hint: How are p values stored in your file?

columns.description: p value. Smaller p values are more significant.
Negative log₁₀ of the p value. Larger values indicate greater significance.

errors.message: Please select how p values are represented in your data.

groups.label: Effect size
groups.hint: At least one effect size must be selected.

columns.description: Regression coefficient.
Odds ratio estimate.
Hazard ratio estimate.
Z-score statistic.

errors.message: At least one effect size must be selected.
Odds ratio and hazard ratio cannot both be selected as effect sizes.

primaryForm.name: primary_effect_cnv
primaryForm.hint: You've selected multiple effect sizes. Which is the primary measure of effect for your study?

groups.label: Uncertainty estimate
groups.hint: How have you measured the uncertainty of your effect size estimates?
groups.requirementDetail: Required when an effect size is provided.

columns.description: Standard error.
Lower bound of the primary effect size confidence interval (typically odds ratio).
Upper bound of the primary effect size confidence interval (typically odds ratio).

errors.message: Standard error is only valid for beta, and beta requires a standard error.
Z-score is a standardised statistic and cannot have an associated uncertainty estimate.
Confidence intervals are only valid for odds ratio or hazard ratio. Both bounds must be provided if one is given.

groups.label: Statistical model information
groups.hint: Additional information about the statistical model used in the study.

columns.description: Genetic association model type (e.g. additive, dominant, recessive)

groups.label: Other fields
groups.hint: Please consider including this data to improve the quality of your submission.
groups.note: You can also include a reasonable number of extra fields relevant to your study in your submission.

columns.description: Sample size per variant.

validationRules.detail: If beta is selected as an effect size, standard_error must also be included as an uncertainty estimate. Standard error may only be used with beta.

validationRules.summary: Confidence intervals require odds ratio or hazard ratio
validationRules.detail: Confidence interval bounds are only valid when odds_ratio or hazard_ratio is selected as an effect size. If one bound is provided, both must be provided.

validationRules.summary: Z-score does not accept uncertainty estimates
validationRules.detail: Z-score is a standardised statistic. When z_score is the sole or primary effect size, no uncertainty estimate (standard error or confidence interval) should be provided.

validationRules.summary: Odds ratio and hazard ratio are mutually exclusive
validationRules.detail: Odds ratio and hazard ratio cannot both be provided in the same file.

validationRules.summary: Primary effect size must be designated
validationRules.detail: If more than one effect size column is present, one must be designated as the primary measure of effect. The primary measure of effect is placed in a standardised column in the output file.
